maia-pheikrishvili.name: Maia Pheikrishvili
maia-pheikrishvili.title: Managing Partner & Auditor
maia-pheikrishvili.summary: Auditor and financial expert with a PhD in Economics. A leader with over 25 years of experience in auditing and the academic field. Director of Prestige-Audit LLC and the Adjara branch of the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA). Certified professional accountant with extensive experience as a financial analyst, mentor, trainer, and tax advisor for international projects (TACIS TRACECA, UNDP, SDC, ACEM).

nato-romanadze.name: Nato Romanadze
nato-romanadze.title: Senior Auditor
nato-romanadze.summary: Experienced auditor and chief accountant with over 20 years of practice in financial management and auditing. Certified Professional Accountant (GFPAA).

mzia-gegechkori.name: Mzia Gegechkori
mzia-gegechkori.title: Senior Auditor
mzia-gegechkori.summary: Experienced auditor and chief accountant with over 20 years of practice in financial management and auditing. Certified Professional Accountant (GFPAA).
certifications: Dual Role as Auditor and Accountant

romili-beridze.name: Romili Beridze
romili-beridze.title: Senior Auditor & Financial Manager
romili-beridze.summary: Certified auditor with significant parts of the ACCA program completed (F1–F8, P2, P7, SBL) and a Master's degree from HØGSKOLEN I SØRØST-NORGE. Specialist in audit process planning and financial statement analysis in accordance with IFRS/IFRS SME standards. Specializes in project management and providing strategic financial advice for SMEs. Experience working as an auditor and group manager.
certifications: ACCA Papers F1–F8, P2, P7, SBL

lali-chigogidze.name: Lali Chigogidze
lali-chigogidze.title: Public Sector Auditor & Chief Accountant
lali-chigogidze.summary: Public Sector Auditor and Certified Chief Accountant (GFPAA) with a Master's degree and over 15 years of experience in auditing, accounting, and financial analysis.

gogita-baramidze.name: Gogita Baramidze
gogita-baramidze.title: Senior Auditor & Certified Accountant
gogita-baramidze.summary: Certified auditor with significant parts of the ACCA program completed and an Audit Group Manager with a Master's degree. Expert in real estate and movable property appraisal. Specialist in audit process planning and financial statement analysis in accordance with IFRS/IFRS SME standards. Specializes in project management and strategic financial advice for SMEs.

mzia-melikishvili.name: Mzia Melikishvili
mzia-melikishvili.title: Junior Auditor & Certified Accountant
mzia-melikishvili.summary: Certified accountant (ACCA graduate). Holds a Master's degree in Computer Modeling of Business Processes and has over ten years of experience in financial management. Specializes in IFRS standards and data analysis.
certifications: Master in Computer Modeling of Business Processes

rusudan-gugeshashvili.name: Rusudan Gugeshashvili
rusudan-gugeshashvili.title: Junior Auditor
rusudan-gugeshashvili.summary: Specialist in accounting-reporting and auditing with over 15 years of experience. Trainer in financial accounting and reporting. Certified by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA).

marine-lominadze.name: Marine Lominadze
marine-lominadze.title: Junior Auditor
marine-lominadze.summary: Specialist in the banking and audit sectors with years of experience in financial operations, credit process management, and financial documentation analysis. Experience working with international financial institutions (ProCredit Bank and Halyk Bank) in credit administration, loan documentation preparation, and management, as well as effective communication and relations with corporate clients. Skilled in detailed financial analysis, risk assessment, and process control.

giorgi-seperteladze.name: Giorgi Seperteladze
giorgi-seperteladze.title: Junior Auditor & Accountant
giorgi-seperteladze.summary: Specialist in accounting-reporting and auditing, certified chief accountant. Certified by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA).

nato-jabnidze.name: Nato Jabnidze
nato-jabnidze.title: Head of Accounting and Reporting Department
nato-jabnidze.summary: Financial expert and PhD in Economics, Head of the Accounting and Reporting Department. Associate Professor with over 20 years of professional experience. Certified Chief Accountant in IFRS for SMEs and Taxation. Specialist in financial analysis and the development of accounting policies.

tamar-mzhavanadze.name: Tamar Mzhavanadze
tamar-mzhavanadze.title: Chief Accountant
tamar-mzhavanadze.summary: Over 15 years of practical experience in accounting and financial management. Certified chief accountant, certified by the Georgian Federation of Professional Accountants and Auditors (GFPAA).

rusudan-baramidze.name: Rusudan Baramidze
rusudan-baramidze.title: Accountant
rusudan-baramidze.summary: Bachelor's degree in Business Administration and a Master's degree in Computer Science. Diverse technical skills including financial reporting, VBA, SQL, and web technologies.

tamta-ustalishvili.name: Tamta Ustalishvili
tamta-ustalishvili.title: Accountant
tamta-ustalishvili.summary: Over 10 years of practical experience in accounting and financial management.
certifications: Bachelor in Finance, Banking and Insurance

natia-khajishvili.name: Natia Khajishvili
natia-khajishvili.title: Accountant
natia-khajishvili.summary: Specialist in accounting and auditing with over 10 years of experience. Extensive practice as an accountant. Certified in the preparation of financial statements.
certifications: Preparation of Financial Statements — Service for Accounting, Reporting and Auditing Supervision

tornike-sergeevi.name: Tornike Sergeevi
tornike-sergeevi.title: AML Specialist & Data Analyst
tornike-sergeevi.summary: Data analyst with an MBA from European University of Lefke (Cyprus) and over 10 years of experience in data visualization, reporting, and automation using MS Excel, VBA, SQL, and Power BI. Expert in financial statement analysis and AML compliance procedure management. Uses advanced data analytical techniques to support business decisions at Prestige Audit LTD.

lasha-seperteladze.name: Lasha Seperteladze
lasha-seperteladze.title: Executive Director & Founder | Lawyer, Tax Dispute Specialist
lasha-seperteladze.summary: LLM graduate from Northeastern University School of Law and Harvard University Extension School alumnus, specialist in international law with practical experience in civil disputes in the USA. Over 15 years of experience in tax disputes, civil litigation, and corporate legal consulting. Represents clients before the Revenue Service and the Ministry of Finance Dispute Resolution Council, as well as various court instances.
certifications: LLM — Northeastern University School of Law, Boston
Fluent in Georgian, English, French, and Russian
